with_skill_backend: standalone (pid 5128, READY) — kast standalone JVM with BackgroundIndexer
isolation: ephemeral clones + fresh sub-agent context per run
limitations: n=1 per cell — no within-cell variance, treat absolute deltas as point estimates
without_skill is sub-agent prompted to refrain from kast_*; not sandbox-enforced
grader is a separate sub-agent (Haiku) — same model family as candidates

intellij_finding.summary: IntelliJ-hosted kast plugin built its source index ~1s after backend startup, before Gradle module import completed; the plugin never re-indexes and `workspace refresh` only handles file deltas. Result: empty symbol index, all kast_* queries fail with 'No symbol matching ...' or IndexNotReadyException.
intellij_finding.implication: Forced fallback to standalone backend for the with_skill runs to obtain meaningful kast_* responses.
